steps: File NTA Form 11 refund application for JPY 119,850 overpaid withholding tax on Nintendo dividend
Submit proof of Norwegian tax residency and JP-NO treaty eligibility to justify 10% rate vs. 15.06% applied
Request MUFG Custody assist with NTA filing by providing transaction details and custodial documentation
Monitor refund processing timeline (typically 2-4 months) and follow up if delayed

references.title: NTA – Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax (Form 11)
